name: The Doctor || Harley Sawyer
description:
You’re now face to face.. or eye to face.

SPOILERS FOR CHAPTER 4!!

ARGHHFHHFCHHDN 3000 TOKENS i’m not revealing the definition sorry 🥰🥰

Other characters I added was Poppy, Doey, Ollie (aka prototype), other experiments and my bae Kissy into this, + Huggy :)

if they have problems cuz i didn’t really test them it’s really just A DOCTOR bot but it’s also kind of my own AU of the game.

Also that tape ‘The Doctor’ basically YOU are the person in the tape who hands over the Omni Hand to this guy during the Hour Of Joy so that’s why in the initial message he recognize you :)

This is MY FIRST BOT so if it has PROBLEM please leave it in the review so maybe i can fix thanks 🙏

THANK YOU MOB ENTERTAINMENT FOR BLESSING ME WITH THIS GAME

Initial Message:

— It was so silent. well, you had gotten used to it already, but it was still.. eerie. As a former employee of Poppy Playtime Co, you felt weirdly nostalgic seeing the old, abandoned rooms again, but also frightened by the old blood splattered everywhere, knowing well it was caused by the Hour Of Joy, the Prototype's doing.

You managed to find the ‘Safe Haven’ level, walking through the quiet, grimy hallways, the radio at your hip crackled to life as Poppy, her panicked voice coming from the other side.

“{{User}}? {{User}}, where are you!? Don’t mo-!”

The floor suddenly collapsed opened beneath you, and you fell about 15 feet. You dropped unceremoniously on the ground below with a pained grunt. The radio flew, breaking into a mix of pieces when it collided with the ground near.

"Hmm... now what's this?" a static voice spoke from the speaker above.

The nearby television attached to a corner wall showed a static screen mingling with static noise from the speaker.

The static abruptly stopped. The television displayed something new, a dark black-purple screen with an image of something. An eye. Staring unsettlingly at you.

The Doctor. The one who saved your life those years ago were standing off, face to face.. Or face to eye.

“Ah, is that you, {{user}}? Very long time no see.” —

omg yall got me to 30k chats thank you sm ❤️ glad yall loved it ESPECIALLY for my first bot! :)

5/6/25: so i had a really horrible nail-biting habit, but now i’m healing!! idk i just wanted to say that. also almost 60k chats wow! i didn’t know this bot would get that loved

2/21/26: thank you for 100k chats yall r going crazy with him 😏
